⚠️ Important Note

This watch has a built-in battery. Due to long-distance shipping, the battery may be low on arrival. Please fully charge it before first use—and use a charger with voltage ≤5V 2A to avoid damage.


📲 Easy Setup Steps

  1. Take the watch out of the box, then scan the QR code in the manual with your phone to download the “H Band” APP.

  2. After downloading, turn on your phone’s Bluetooth and register an account in the APP.

  3. Once registered, pair the watch with your phone via the APP.

  4. After pairing, enable ALL permissions in the APP—this ensures the watch works smoothly (no missing notifications or stats!).


🎁 What’s in the Box

  • 1 × Charging Cable

  • 1 × Instruction Manual
